subject: Karrablast, a small blue beetle-like bug-type creature with a single horn protrusion on its head, standing on grass
description: A small compact bug-type creature stands on a grassy surface. It has a rounded blue body with a darker blue head and a prominent single horn or tusk-like protrusion at the front of its face. Its legs are short and stubby, and its overall form is squat and armored-looking. The background is a soft, blurred green suggesting an outdoor grassy environment. The creature faces slightly to the right with a neutral expression. The lighting is even and natural.
foreground: small squat bug-type creature with a horn protrusion, standing on grass
